title: Model Retry Flow
interaction_flow: RunLoop → stream_response_with_retry(get_stream=model.stream_response, rewind, retry_settings, get_retry_advice, previous_response_id, conversation_id)
stream_response_with_retry: init request_attempt=1, policy_attempt=1, failed_policy_attempts=0, compatibility_retries_taken=0
stream_response_with_retry: on StopAsyncIteration → close stream, return
stream_response_with_retry: if conversation_locked AND compatibility enabled AND retries_taken < 3 → compat retry path
stream_response_with_retry → get_retry_advice(ModelRetryAdviceRequest(error, attempt, stream=True, previous_response_id, conversation_id)) → ModelRetryAdvice | None

stream_response_with_retry → _evaluate_retry(error, attempt=policy_attempt, max_retries, retry_policy, retry_backoff, stream=True, replay_unsafe_request=stateful_request, emitted_retry_unsafe_event, provider_advice) → RetryDecision
_evaluate_retry → _normalize_retry_error(error, provider_advice) → ModelRetryNormalizedError [extracts: status_code, error_code, retry_after header, is_abort, is_network_error, is_timeout]
_evaluate_retry: if normalized.is_abort OR emitted_retry_unsafe_event OR provider_advice.replay_safety=='unsafe' → RetryDecision(retry=False)
_evaluate_retry → _call_retry_policy(retry_policy, RetryPolicyContext(error, attempt, max_retries, stream, normalized, provider_advice)) → RetryDecision
_evaluate_retry: if replay_unsafe_request AND not decision._approves_replay AND not provider_marks_replay_safe → RetryDecision(retry=False)
_default_retry_delay: base = min(initial_delay * multiplier^(attempt-1), max_delay); apply jitter ±12.5%
stream_response_with_retry: if not decision.retry → re-raise error to RunLoop
stream_response_with_retry → rewind() [rollback session/conversation state before retry]
stream_response_with_retry: increment request_attempt, policy_attempt, failed_policy_attempts; loop again
RunLoop → get_response_with_retry(get_response=model.get_response, rewind, retry_settings, get_retry_advice, previous_response_id, conversation_id) → ModelResponse
get_response_with_retry: same retry/compatibility logic as streaming, but awaits get_response() directly
get_response_with_retry: on success → apply_retry_attempt_usage(response.usage, failed_attempts) → augments usage with zero-token entries for failed attempts

key_data_structures.ModelRetrySettings: max_retries: int|None, backoff: ModelRetryBackoffSettings|None, policy: RetryPolicy|None (not serialized)
key_data_structures.ModelRetryBackoffSettings: initial_delay: float (default 0.25s), max_delay: float (default 2.0s), multiplier: float (default 2.0), jitter: bool (default True)
key_data_structures.ModelRetryAdvice: suggested: bool|None, retry_after: float|None, replay_safety: 'safe'|'unsafe'|None, reason: str|None, normalized: ModelRetryNormalizedError|None
key_data_structures.ModelRetryAdviceRequest: error, attempt, stream: bool, previous_response_id, conversation_id
key_data_structures.ModelRetryNormalizedError: status_code, error_code, message, request_id, retry_after, is_abort, is_network_error, is_timeout
key_data_structures.RetryDecision: retry: bool, delay: float|None, reason: str|None, _approves_replay: bool (internal)
key_data_structures.RetryPolicyContext: error, attempt, max_retries, stream, normalized: ModelRetryNormalizedError, provider_advice: ModelRetryAdvice|None

key_relationships: _evaluate_retry calls _normalize_retry_error to extract structured error facts
stream_response_with_retry calls get_retry_advice (provider-supplied callable, e.g. get_openai_retry_advice)
stream_response_with_retry calls rewind() to rollback conversation/session state before each retry
ModelRetrySettings is sourced from ModelSettings.retry field on the Agent/RunConfig
provider_managed_retries_disabled context manager suppresses SDK-level retries during runner-managed retries
branching_conditions: emitted_retry_unsafe_event (stream advanced past response.created/response.in_progress) → no retry
retry_policy is None → no retry (policy opt-in required)
stateful_request (has previous_response_id or conversation_id) AND not _approves_replay AND not provider_marks_safe → no retry (replay safety guard)
conversation_locked error AND compatibility enabled AND <3 compat retries taken → compat retry path (bypasses policy)
important_notes: Retry is opt-in — requires ModelRetrySettings.policy to be set. Compatibility conversation_locked retries always run (unless max_retries=0). Stateful requests (conversation_id / previous_response_id) require replay safety approval before retrying. Provider-managed retries (SDK-level) are disabled on replay attempts to avoid double-retry. Usage accounting tracks failed attempt tokens as zero-token entries. get_retry_advice is injected from the model adapter (e.g. get_openai_retry_advice for OpenAI models).
source_files_analyzed: src/agents/retry.py (data classes: ModelRetrySettings, ModelRetryAdvice, ModelRetryAdviceRequest, RetryDecision, RetryPolicyContext, ModelRetryNormalizedError, ModelRetryBackoffSettings)
